inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $9,290M minus capital spending $216M, divided by 1,674.3M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 owner cash as base; Q1 2026 adjusted diluted EPS $1.32 (+7.3% YoY) supports low-single-digit run-rate but base uses filed annual FCF to avoid quarterly noise from ABI equity income

bear.notes: Accelerated cigarette volume decline; menthol ban; dividend cut; ABI impairment; multiple compression

base.notes: Pricing offsets volume decline; oral/on! mix improves margins; dividend payout ~80% of FCF; mid-single-digit adjusted EPS path per management Vision

bull.notes: on! share gains; oral OCI margin sustains; ABI mark recovery; buybacks at discount

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: ABI equity method stake carried below pre-impairment marks; Cronos stake small; not used as dhando floor (10-K FY2025 equity method note)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating tobacco manufacturer, not resource royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: NJOY/e-vapor goodwill and intangible impairments in FY2025; segment moved back to all other Q1 2026 (10-K Note 2; Q1 2026 10-Q)
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: Post-impairment e-vapor path uncertain; explicit zero separate terminal after scan

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: ABI ~10% stake; equity income $498M FY2025; impairment history — overlay only, not in Lawrence FCF0

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Tobacco litigation settlements episodic; excluded from normalized owner cash
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: Settlement flows not in 7-year run rate

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: on! oral nicotine pouches in oral tobacco segment revenue/OCI growth (oral rev $2,802M FY2025; OCI $1,828M)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Cigarette list-price increases and mix offset ~10% smokeable volume decline; oral segment grows via on! pouches; management targets mid-single-digit adjusted diluted EPS CAGR to 2028 from $4.87 recast 2022 base
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 shipment volumes; Q1 2026 adjusted EPS $1.32 (+7.3% YoY); Vision 2028 framework

falsifiers.observation: Smokeable shipment volume down >12% for two consecutive years without price/mix offset

falsifiers.action: Downgrade dhando to none; stance watch or trim

falsifiers.observation: FDA final menthol rule with near-term implementation
falsifiers.action: Move base toward bear; cap exit multiple at 8x

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
